converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Frederick Morrison Babcock publications
Babcock, Frederick Morrison.
4087
3 cubic feet. 3 cubic feet.
1941-1973. Publications, including land valuations, estimates, reports and development studies. Publications, including land valuations, estimates, reports and development studies by Frederick Morrison Babcock. Areas represented in these studies are located in Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Kansas, Maryland, Minnesota, Missouri, New Jersey, New York, North Carolina, Nevada, New Mexico, Pennsylvania, Virginia and Washington, D.C. Collection material in English 2074677
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, April 2002; Julia Guarneri, June 2002
Date modified:
RMC Staff, May 2015
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Publications, including land valuations, estimates, reports and development studies by Frederick Morrison Babcock. Areas represented in these studies are located in Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Kansas, Maryland, Minnesota, Missouri, New Jersey, New York, North Carolina, Nevada, New Mexico, Pennsylvania, Virginia and Washington, D.C.
RELATED MATERIAL
Related collection: William H. Babcock and Sons. Records. University of Wyoming, Archive of Contemporary History.
Cite As:
Frederick Morrison Babcock Publications, #4087. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Biographical / Historical
Real estate appraiser and consultant. Frederick Morrison Babcock (1898-1983) and his brother Henry Babcock were affiliated with their fathers real estate appraisal firm, William H. Babcock and Sons.
Real estate appraisers. Real property -- Washington (D.C.) Real property -- Virginia. Real property -- Pennsylvania. Real property -- North Carolina. Real property -- New York (State) Real property -- New Mexico. Real property -- New Jersey. Real property -- Nevada. Real property -- Missouri. Real property -- Minnesota. Real property -- Maryland. Real property -- Kansas. Real property -- Iowa. Real property -- Indiana. Real property -- Illinois. Real property surveys. Real property -- Valuation. Real estate development. Land use -- Planning. City planning. Babcock, Henry Andrews, 1891- Babcock, William H. William H. Babcock and Sons
